summary: Safer auto-exits, clearer charts, and faster stall recovery for live trading.
release_notes: Bridge now has an external watchdog: detects freezes within ~9s and auto-restarts without touching the UI window.
When the bridge restarts, the app reconnects gracefully (disconnected overlay, no page reload, no state loss).
L2 depth subscription bugs fixed: subscriptions now survive reconnects correctly and recover silently when dropped.
Scanner poll loop no longer blocks on slow requests — each table updates independently as data arrives.
Auto-Exit now supports multiple active entries per symbol, with separate chart lines and order badges for each one.
Auto-Exit trigger direction is based on offset sign: negative triggers on price down to target, positive on price up.
Chart volume logic rebuilt for consistency with IB data sources, improving live vs historical volume alignment.
L2 and Time & Sales availability warnings now appear in panel headers. Panel resize jitter at edges fixed.
Windows login sessions use DPAPI-protected refresh token storage with automatic migration.
